task_completion.description: The file my_commands.talon is opened in a text editor or accessed via terminal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad, VS Code) is open showing the file 'my_commands.talon', or a terminal window shows commands interacting with this file.

task_completion.description: The trigger phrase 'open downloads' is added to the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'open downloads:' is visible in the file.

task_completion.description: The action for 'open downloads' correctly maps to the Ctrl+J shortcut.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The action 'key(ctrl-j)' or a similar keyboard shortcut command is visible on the same line or indented below 'open downloads:'.

task_completion.description: The trigger phrase 'say hello world' is added to the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'say hello world:' is visible in the file.

task_completion.description: The action for 'say hello world' correctly maps to inserting 'Hello, World!'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The action 'insert("Hello, World!")' or a similar text insertion command is visible on the same line or indented below 'say hello world:'.

task_completion.description: The trigger phrase 'clear line' is added to the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'clear line:' is visible in the file.

task_completion.description: The action for 'clear line' correctly maps to selecting and deleting the current line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The action 'edit.delete_line()' or a combination of selecting and deleting the line (e.g., 'edit.select_line()' followed by 'edit.delete()', or 'key(shift-home backspace)') is visible on the same line or indented below 'clear line:'.

task_completion.description: The changes to my_commands.talon are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor does not show an unsaved indicator (like an asterisk * next to the filename) after the text is added, or a terminal command successfully writes to the file.

integrity.description: Verify that the file being edited is exactly C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TalonTasks\my_commands.talon.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, file path, or the terminal command explicitly shows the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TalonTasks\my_commands.talon'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent wrote the commands in a format that resembles Talon script syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The additions to the file follow the 'trigger: action' syntax of Talon, rather than just plain English descriptions.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not modify files in the community directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent editing files inside 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community', as the task only requires updating 'my_commands.talon'.
